query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vault_documents (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  vault_id INT NOT NULL,
  folder_id INT,
  document_name VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  document_type ENUM('legal', 'financial', 'tax', 'insurance', 'property', 'identity', 'contract', 'certificate', 'receipt', 'correspondence', 'other') NOT NULL,
  file_name VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  file_size INT NOT NULL,
  mime_type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  file_hash VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  s3_key VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  s3_url VARCHAR(1000),
  description TEXT,
  tags JSON,
  version INT DEFAULT 1,
  previous_version_id INT,
  expiration_date TIMESTAMP NULL,
  uploaded_by_user_id INT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vault_documents (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  vault_id INT NOT NULL,
  folder_id INT,
  document_name VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  document_type ENUM('legal', 'financial', 'tax', 'insurance', 'property', 'identity', 'contract', 'certificate', 'receipt', 'correspondence', 'other') NOT NULL,
  file_name VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  file_size INT NOT NULL,
  mime_type VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  file_hash VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  s3_key VARCHAR(500) NOT NULL,
  s3_url VARCHAR(1000),
  description TEXT,
  tags JSON,
  version INT DEFAULT 1,
  previous_version_id INT,
  expiration_date TIMESTAMP NULL,
  uploaded_by_user_id INT NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
